raw_consumer_statement: I was dealing with identity theft starting in XX/XX/year>. Around XXXX of that year, I had a fight with XXXX over some fraudulent transactions because they wanted me to pay for stuff the thief bought. The thief tried every card I had. Before all that, I called Macy 's to put a hold on my card, and the agent said she did. But then I was shocked on XX/XX/year>, to see a {$290.00} purchase on my account. At that exact time, I was actually renewing my vows! I called Macy 's, and they said they'd look into it, but then I got a letter saying their investigation concluded I had to pay for what the thief bought. That's super unfair to me because they made that decision without asking me for any documents. I'm so sick and tired of this happening over and over. I just sorted things out with XXXX, and now this again.
